title: Add M-Pesa payment integration to AccountingPro
description: We need direct M-Pesa STK push integration for collecting payments from customers in Kenya. This would eliminate manual reconciliation of M-Pesa transactions.
responseNotes: M-Pesa integration is scheduled for AccountingPro v3.3.0 Q2 2025. Development is underway.

title: Payroll calculator gives wrong NHIF deductions
description: Since the NHIF-to-SHIF transition in Kenya, the payroll calculator still uses old NHIF rates. This is causing compliance issues and employee complaints.
responseNotes: SHIF rate tables updated in PayrollManager v2.4.9. All affected payroll runs should be recalculated.

title: The new dashboard UI is excellent!
description: The redesigned AccountingPro dashboard in v3.2.0 is outstanding. The real-time cash flow widget saves me 2 hours a week. Keep up the great work!
responseNotes: Thank you for the kind feedback! We've shared this with the product team.

title: CRM contact import should support LinkedIn exports
description: Allow importing contacts directly from LinkedIn CSV export format. Currently we have to manually reformat each file before importing.
responseNotes: Under review by the CRM product team. LinkedIn CSV column mapping will be added to the import wizard.

title: Support desk response times are too slow
description: We logged a critical payroll issue on a Monday and didn't get a response until Thursday. This is unacceptable for a business-critical product.
responseNotes: Escalated to support management. SLA breach acknowledged. Customer compensated with 1 month credit.

title: Add Swahili language support to HRManagementSuite
description: Many of our employees in Tanzania and Kenya prefer Swahili. Adding a Swahili UI option would significantly improve employee adoption of the self-service portal.
responseNotes: Swahili localization is included in the HRManagementSuite v2.2.0 roadmap. Target Q3 2025.

title: InventoryTracker should support multiple warehouse locations
description: We operate warehouses in Accra, Kumasi, and Takoradi. Currently we have to maintain separate accounts for each location which makes consolidated reporting impossible.
responseNotes: Multi-warehouse support is the headline feature of InventoryTracker v2.0. Expected Q2 2025.

title: ProjectManager task dependencies don't prevent starting blocked tasks
description: Task dependency constraints are not enforced. Team members can mark a dependent task as started even if the prerequisite task is not complete.
responseNotes: Dependency enforcement logic is being rebuilt in ProjectManager v1.1.0.

title: Improve AccountingPro reconciliation matching algorithm
description: The bank reconciliation auto-matching misses obvious matches (same amount, same date). We end up manually matching 60% of transactions.
responseNotes: A new AI-assisted reconciliation engine is being evaluated. Proof of concept shows 95% auto-match rate.

title: CRMPlatform pipeline export should include custom fields
description: When exporting the sales pipeline to Excel, custom fields we've added to deals are not included. We lose critical data when sharing reports externally.
